I'm an AI & Data Science student who builds systems that think and products that ship.

At Hyderabad Institute of Technology, I'm sharpening expertise in machine learning, cloud architecture, and full-stack engineering — holding a CGPA of 8.7, not because I chase grades, but because I'm genuinely obsessed with how things work at depth.

I've engineered a real-time behavior modeling and anomaly detection system at Future Tech Solutions, and I'm currently building production features at Tech Innovators Inc. — shipping code that real users interact with daily.

My mindset is builder-first. I think in systems, design for scale, and iterate relentlessly. I thrive in rooms where ambitious things are being built from scratch.
